title: Ramapuram Church
tagline: Ramapuram Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Saint Augustine's Forane Church is a Syro-Malabar church complex located in Ramapuram of Kottayam district, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Saint Augustine's Forane Church is a Syro-Malabar church complex located in Ramapuram of Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is one of the most prominent churches in the Eparchy of Palai and is a notable shrine housing the tomb of Thevarparampil Kunjachan. There are currently three church buildings in the same compound of which the oldest one was built in 1450. A second church in the name of Blessed Mary was built in 1864.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Ramapuram is a town in the Kottayam district of the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple
topPlaces.description: Sree Rama Swami Temple is an ancient Hindu temple located in Ramapuram village in Meenachil tehsil and near Pala in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is classified one among the 108 Abhimana kshetrams of Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Manathoor
topPlaces.description: Manathoor is a small village in Kottayam district, aside Pala - Thodupuzha Highway, 12 km from Palai town and 15 km from Thodupuzha town. It lies aside of Main Eastern Highway (SH-8).

topPlaces.name: Pizhaku
topPlaces.description: Pizhaku is a village in Kottayam District in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Pampanal Waterfalls
topPlaces.description: Pampanal Waterfalls is located in Kottayam district in Kerala, India. It is located near Manathoor on the Pala-Thodupuzha bypass route, approximately 42 km (26 mi) from Kottayam town and 15 km (9.3 mi) from Thodupuzha.

topPlaces.name: Kudakkachira
topPlaces.description: Kudakkachira is a small village 9 km away from Palai on Pala-uzhavoor road of Ernakulam - Sabarimala state highway in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is part of Meenachil Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kuninji
topPlaces.description: Kuninji is a village in the Idukki district of Kerala, India. It is located close to Thodupuzha in central Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kadanad
topPlaces.description: Kadanad (Malayalam: കടനാട്, romanized: Kaḍanāḍŭ) is a Panchayat and Village in Meenachil Taluk of Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

items.note: Ramapuram is a town in the Kottayam district of the Indian state of Kerala.

Sree Rama Swami Temple is an ancient Hindu temple located in Ramapuram village in Meenachil tehsil and near Pala in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is classified one among the 108 Abhimana kshetrams of Vaishnavate tradition.
Manathoor is a small village in Kottayam district, aside Pala - Thodupuzha Highway, 12 km from Palai town and 15 km from Thodupuzha town. It lies aside of Main Eastern Highway (SH-8).
Pizhaku is a village in Kottayam District in the Indian state of Kerala.

Pampanal Waterfalls is located in Kottayam district in Kerala, India. It is located near Manathoor on the Pala-Thodupuzha bypass route, approximately 42 km (26 mi) from Kottayam town and 15 km (9.3 mi) from Thodupuzha.
Kudakkachira is a small village 9 km away from Palai on Pala-uzhavoor road of Ernakulam - Sabarimala state highway in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is part of Meenachil Taluk.
Kuninji is a village in the Idukki district of Kerala, India. It is located close to Thodupuzha in central Kerala.
Kadanad (Malayalam: കടനാട്, romanized: Kaḍanāḍŭ) is a Panchayat and Village in Meenachil Taluk of Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramapuram Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramapuram Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramapuram Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramapuram Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramapuram Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramapuram Church?
faq.a: Stays in Ramapuram Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramapuram Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramapuram, Kottayam, Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple, Manathoor, Pizhaku, Pampanal Waterfalls.
